title: ZXSpace Tips & Strategy
description: Practical ZXSpace tips for steadier cannon movement, shield preservation, UFO timing, power-up use, and higher scores.
summary: Good ZXSpace strategy starts with controlled cannon movement, shield discipline, and clearing waves without exposing the city.

sections.heading: Protect the city
paragraphs: Survival depends on more than shooting aliens quickly. The city and shield line buy time, and losing that protection makes later waves harder.
Move early enough to clear lanes before aliens descend into dangerous positions.

sections.heading: Use the shields
paragraphs: Shields absorb alien fire and alien overlap damage, but they are segmented and can be worn down.
Do not treat shields as permanent cover. Use them to recover position, then move back into useful firing lanes.
bullets: Repair damaged shield segments when Shield Repair appears
Avoid letting aliens overlap shield segments repeatedly
Keep enough distance between the formation and the city

sections.heading: Score better
paragraphs: Top-row aliens are worth more than lower rows, and UFO targets are useful bonus-score opportunities.
Double Laser is best used for clearing clustered aliens or catching up when the formation starts to press downward.
